tasks.instruction: Choose the correct answer A, B or C.

items.stem: You _________ wear a helmet when you ride a bike. It's the law.
I _________ swim really well. I go to the pool three times a week.
You look tired. You _________ go to bed earlier tonight.
Students _________ use their phones during the test. It's not allowed.
It's raining hard. We _________ take an umbrella or we'll get wet.
